title: Illustrating a Future from a Picture Book

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back from an outing, Mejiro Palmer
detours us into a cafe she's been keen on visiting.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh, it's been ages since I came here. I used
come here all the time when I was a kid, and...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey Rice! Did you drop in here for a
breather?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: H-hello! Umm, yes!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
This cafe looks just like the one in my favorite
picture book. I enjoy being here—it makes me
feel like I'm inside the story. The big bookshelves
are exactly like the ones in the book, too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: The big bookshelves, huh?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Could that book you're talking about be The Fairy Cafe, by any chance?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Yes, that's the one. But Palmer, how did you...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, wait! I remember now! Your mother's the one
who—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wrote the book? Yep, that's her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was just saying how I used to come here
all the time, right? Well, my mom was the one
who would bring me.

text_block_list.name: Young Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Look, Mama! There're books aaall the way up
there! How do you get them down?!

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... Oh! Maybe you have to ask fairies to help
get them for you?

text_block_list.name: Young Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wooow! What kind of fairies?! Are they friendly?

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Mother
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! I bet they're fairies that wear glasses, and
they can use their glasses to see into a person's
heart. So I'm sure you can become the best of
friends with them.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oooh... That's so amazing! You were the one who
came up with the story!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Naaah! I just happened to be there when
she got that idea.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Mom was always like that, adding things to my
silly ramblings. Next thing I knew, they were made
into a book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Talking with her was, like, the most fun thing
ever. She took me everywhere, too.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... Were there other books she wrote that came
about in the same way?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yep! I'm pretty sure there was this one time my
family and I all went to the park, and...

text_block_list.name: Young Palmer
text_block_list.text: Wooow... That tulip is so tall!

text_block_list.name: Palmer's Mother
text_block_list.text:
She must be a bold princess showing off her dress.
I wonder if that means we're in the Flower
Kingdom right now?

text_block_list.name: Young Palmer
text_block_list.text:
The flowers must be holding a ball in their pretty
dresses! Mama, let's dance with them, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, it went something like that. Being with
Mom was lotsa fun 'cause it always felt like I was
an adventurer, exploring different worlds!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
U-um, I feel the same way! Whenever I read the
books your mother wrote...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
It always feels like there's another world in the
pages, and I'm always so excited to visit them!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So, um... Thank you for blessing me with the
opportunity to explore such wonderful worlds!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Hehe. You're welcome.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And thanks for the kind words, too. I'll let Mom
know what you said!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wow, I had no idea Rice was one of my mom's
fans. It's almost hilarious how obvious it should've
been.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. Knowing Mom's books make someone
else's life better makes me proud to be her
daughter.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I grew up watching my mom working hard and
doing her best all the time.
choice_data_list: You take after your mother, then.
You take after your mother, then.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You know, Mom actually wants to write a new
picture book based off me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
And, like, I'd love to help out, but I asked her to
hold off it for now.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I mean, if she wrote a new book, I'd be part of a
glamorous world that transforms someone else's
life.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: But I don't want to be seen just yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I want to win lots more races and work even
harder than Mom.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I want to get published in a book after I reach peak wahey! Y'know what I mean?
choice_data_list: You'd better sign a copy for me once you do!
You'd better sign a copy for me once you do!
I bet it'll be an amazing picture book.
I bet it'll be an amazing picture book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: I want to get published in a book after I reach peak wahey! Y'know what I mean?
choice_data_list: You'd better sign a copy for me once you do!
You'd better sign a copy for me once you do!
I bet it'll be an amazing picture book.
I bet it'll be an amazing picture book.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hey, why're you saying that as if you're not gonna
be involved? If I'm gonna be in the book, then
you're obvs gonna be in it, too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
After all, there's no talking about me without
talking about you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You're gonna be right there with me autographing
books, so you'd better be prepared! Let's do our
best when the big day comes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I'll make it amazing!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to call Mom and tell her my big
plan. I'll let her know about Rice's glowing review,
too!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her giddiness is absolutely heartwarming. I can't
wait to be in a picture book someday, too.
